flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Snead State Community College rose 29% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.0k → $9.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Snead State Community College fell 12% between 2009 and 2010 (19.2% → 17.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Snead State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Snead State Community College rose 20% between 2007 and 2010 (21.4% → 25.7%).
